title: Ghost's Better Amethyst
description: Ever Wanted Amethyst to be Useful?
body:
![A minecraft styled log with golden text that reads "Better" and stylized purple text that says "Amethyst" ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/403c4523eaddf520b4a0e917b87086cb7b802bfd.png)

Ghost's Better Amethyst is a mod about makeing amethyst useful. Combine it with diamonds to craft powerful new tools and armor. Combine it with netherite scrap to make Dark Amethyst. 

Amethyst Tools are highly durable and better than diamond, they have high enchantability as well!

Dark Amethyst Tools are even better, better than netherite even!
To get Dark Amethyst tools you'll have to craft the Amethyst Core to upgrade your normal Amethyst Tools.

A mod such as JEI or EMI is highly recomended.
Feel free to included it in your modpacks.

This is my first mod ever, it was made using MCcreator. :)
